title: derris elegans var. korthalsiana
intro: Derris elegans var. korthalsiana, also known as the Korthals' derris, is a plant species belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae) and is native to tropical regions of Asia and Australia. It possesses medicinal properties, primarily used in traditional medicine, due to the presence of rotenone and related compounds, which exhibit insecticidal, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antiparasitic agent. Derris elegans var. korthalsiana can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, or ointments, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
